address.streetAddress: JCPR+C67, SRCM Rd, Chiriamore, Nazrul Islam Avenue, Kaikhali, North Dumdum, West Bengal 700136, India

itemListElement.reviewBody: The school is no doubt one of the best school. But the behaviour of female security  guard is worst.she always behaves roughly. Me and  my daughter went to collect the TC but she says to get out off the school stand outside the gate.and make faces as if we are trespassers .and when I protested she  threatened me that she would  take us to the principal mam.when I asked her that this is my daughter's ex school she didn't allow her to enter her school  also.

itemReviewed.name: Mangalam Vidya Niketan - Nazrul Islam Avenue,Dakhin Mart Kaikhalii

itemListElement.reviewBody:
Here are the drawbacks of this school:
1. Tobacco smell
2.Just a business with too much cost for everything like admission fees 75k for kindergarten 3-4k for books 9-12k tution fees and so on
3. Many teachers insult the student without knowing literally anything about the student
4. Secularism does not exist for this school. My daughter has been very uncomfortable with the religious matter in this school, morning prayers are from Hinduism etc.
5. Education is very bad. The teachers leave everything for higher classes. Some teachers can't speak English properly and don't bother to explain or teach anything.
6. Very less features like canteen, swimming pool, lockers absent
7. Extra curriculum activities like clubs happened for a few days and completely stopped. Karate classes never took place ever since covid
8. Teachers focus only on a few students and the rest are ignored.

itemReviewed.name: Mangalam Vidya Niketan - Nazrul Islam Avenue,Dakhin Mart Kaikhalii

itemListElement.reviewBody: One of the best icse school in kolkata.situated in kaikhali near Chiria more.Environment is good to grow your child.

itemReviewed.name: Mangalam Vidya Niketan - Nazrul Islam Avenue,Dakhin Mart Kaikhalii

itemListElement.reviewBody: This is a good school but the major problem is the traffic around the school at the time when the school closes everyday. The school is situated on a narrow road and the pool cars dont have enough space to park in front of the school nor is there any space in the school so that the pool cars can pick the children from within the school premises.  Besides the school doesnt have a proper play ground. If we overlook these two factors, the school is other wise very good with quality teachers.

itemReviewed.name: Mangalam Vidya Niketan - Nazrul Islam Avenue,Dakhin Mart Kaikhalii

itemListElement.reviewBody: This school is Amazing. It makes us understand the real value of 'school is our second home'. Teachers are very friendly. They are really very caring . The school teaches us how to be disciplined and to respect each and everyone's opinion. It teaches us the moral values and shapes all the children. I am grateful to all the teachers for taking out the best in me and making me realize that one-day I can do a miracle. The members of my the school are my second family.
